description: This file defines a repository module for managing AI run records in a MySQL database, including functions to create, retrieve, update, and list AI runs.

methods.name: createAiRun
methods.description: Creates a new AI run record in the database and returns it.

methods.name: getAiRunById
methods.description: Fetches an AI run record by its ID.

methods.name: updateAiRun
methods.description: Updates mutable fields of an existing AI run record.

methods.name: listAiRunsByBuildId
methods.description: Lists all AI runs associated with a specific build ID, ordered by creation time.
